name: Clovis

movements.notes: partition the run and burpee pull-ups as needed

description: A 10-mile run combined with 150 burpee pull-ups, partitioned however the athlete chooses — an endurance-first chipper with a large gymnastics finisher.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/clovis (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-09
